qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the DSSP algorithm?
qa_pairs.answer: The DSSP algorithm is the standard method for assigning secondary structure to the amino acids of a protein, given the atomic-resolution coordinates of the protein.

qa_pairs.question: What version of the DSSP module is available?
qa_pairs.answer: The available version of the DSSP module is 3.1.4.

qa_pairs.question: What type of software is DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: DSSP is categorized as chemistry ('chem') software.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the homepage for DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for DSSP is https://swift.cmbi.umcn.nl/gv/dssp/.

qa_pairs.question: Which articles should be cited if I use DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: If you use DSSP, you should cite: 1) A series of PDB related databases for everyday needs. Wouter G Touw, Coos Baakman, Jon Black, Tim AH te Beek, E Krieger, Robbie P Joosten, Gert Vriend. Nucleic Acids Research 2015 January; 43(Database issue): D364-D368. 2) Dictionary of protein secondary structure: pattern recognition of hydrogen-bonded and geometrical features. Kabsch W, Sander C, Biopolymers. 1983 22 2577-2637. PMID: 6667333; UI: 84128824.

qa_pairs.question: Who are some of the authors of the first recommended citation for DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: Some of the authors of the first recommended citation for DSSP include Wouter G Touw, Coos Baakman, Jon Black, Tim AH te Beek, E Krieger, Robbie P Joosten, and Gert Vriend.

qa_pairs.question: When was the first article recommended for citing DSSP published?
qa_pairs.answer: The first article recommended for citing DSSP was published in January 2015.

qa_pairs.question: What is the title of the second recommended citation for DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: The title of the second recommended citation for DSSP is "Dictionary of protein secondary structure: pattern recognition of hydrogen-bonded and geometrical features."

qa_pairs.question: Who authored the second recommended citation for DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: The second recommended citation for DSSP was authored by Kabsch W and Sander C.

qa_pairs.question: What is the PMID for the 1983 Biopolymers article related to DSSP?
qa_pairs.answer: The PMID for the 1983 Biopolymers article is 6667333.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the DSSP software?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the DSSP software is https://swift.cmbi.umcn.nl/gv/dssp/.
